config.section.game_maker.label: Game Maker Studio
config.section.game_maker.desc: Create and refine isolated offline 2D and 3D browser games with an AuraGo agent.
config.game_maker.disabled_desc: Enable the integration first. Write permissions remain locked until you explicitly grant them.
config.game_maker.restart_note: Enabling the Game Maker service or changing its runtime paths requires an AuraGo restart after saving.
config.game_maker.permissions_desc: For game creation, disable read-only mode and allow creation and editing. Delete and media generation remain optional.
help.game_maker.enabled: Makes the Game Maker APIs and isolated agent workflow available. Secure write permissions are configured separately.
help.game_maker.readonly: Blocks all project and revision mutations even when individual permissions are enabled.
help.game_maker.allow_create: Allows administrators and the Game Maker agent to create managed game projects.
help.game_maker.allow_edit: Allows agent jobs, change requests, validation, revision publication, and restore operations.
help.game_maker.allow_delete: Allows deletion of managed game projects. Shared media remains protected.
help.game_maker.allow_media_generation: Allows project-bound image and music generation when matching providers are configured.
